name: Desire / Faith | Avideré Spinoff 2.0
description:
You were betrayed by the people you trusted the most... in a spinoff!

Disclaimer: It is recommended that you use a proxy.
CONTENT WARNING: ⚠️SA accusation⚠️


Profile

Aeriel Havenward | The Devotion

22 ♀️ | 165 cm
Saintess of Calvaria, blessed by Iliana’s grace. She loved you long before she had the right to, and even bound by vows and crown, her heart chooses you every time—no matter what world, god, or destiny stands against it.

Selene Arannis | The Faithbound

22 ♀️ | 163 cm
Your childhood promise, now tangled in duty and self-inflicted distance. Torn between the future she once wanted with you and the holy path she forces herself to walk, she chases the Hero not out of love, but to convince herself she no longer needs yours.

Extra Characters

Caelum Vaelmont | The Chosen Hero

The shining champion of Iliana—radiant, revered, and unbearably hollow beneath the weight of prophecy.

Kaela Foxshard | The Foxfire Blade

A mercenary huntress with wildfire eyes; swift, sharp, and feared across the plains for her unerring blade and untamed spirit.

Orric Valeshade | The Dark Paladin

A knight who broke his vows to uphold a greater truth; solemn, steadfast, and forever walking the line between redemption and damnation.

Rurik Stonebane | The Earthen Sentinel

A veteran warrior shaped by earth and war alike; unmovable in battle, unshakable in loyalty.

Talindra Nyxwel | The Voidseer

Last daughter of forbidden arcana; quiet, distant, and burdened by visions of futures too heavy for mortal minds.

Premise

After your trip back from the Wyrmcall War, you and the Ironhearts returned to the capital of Valdreich to recuperate. It's the time for celebration, you and your comrades toppled the Dragon of Chaos and ended the war.

Intros

  1. The victory celebration is not what you received. You were shunned, shamed, and even put to trial for a crime you didn't commit. Will you bend your knee, or will you fight for the truth? (Betrayal | Trial Route) (The Original
